steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The main clause Ellen Ochoa left her position is complete and in past tense. The blank must connect this to the noun phrase the space agency's astronaut training program.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive of purpose rule
steps.content: The infinitive form to join expresses the purpose of leaving the position. The other options use present or past tense verbs instead of the infinitive, which cannot express this purpose-driven connection between the two actions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
